_comment: Hand-curated field docs that extend data/proto-docs.json. Keys are dot-joined path segments with '*' for array indices and map keys. Path-keyed entries take precedence over proto-extracted TypeName.fieldName entries. Both the Decoded and Processed tiers are looked up against this file.
eventStream: Per-event records emitted by the in-game collector, in wire-time order. Large matches can contain 100k+ entries.
header.tickRate: Ticks per second the collector sampled at. Divide any tick count by this to convert to seconds.
header.s64ToNick: Steam64 -> display name at match-join. Used by the UI to resolve every numeric player identifier.
header.s64ToTeamnum: Steam64 -> team slot 1-10. Team 0 == world / environment.
header.teamnumToS64: Inverse of s64ToTeamnum: team slot -> Steam64. Team slots 1-5 are Team 1, 6-10 are Team 2.
header.activeConfigMod: Config mod / gameplay rule set active for the match.
match.snipe_count: Total snipes across all players in the match.
match.kill_count: Total kills across all players in the match.
leaderboard.*.personal.dealt: Total damage dealt by this player (any target, including environment).
leaderboard.*.personal.received: Total damage received by this player from any source.
leaderboard.*.personal.pvp_dealt: Damage dealt by this player specifically TO other players (paired DamageReceived.victim was a player).
leaderboard.*.rivals.*.dealt: Damage dealt to the named rival. Rivalry is player-on-player only.
odf_map: Raw ordnance ODF filename -> prettified weapon/unit name. Used by the UI to humanize otherwise cryptic ODF strings.
